## Appendix: Quick Reference

### Key NPCs Quick Stats

**Legate Marcus Corvinus**: Use **Knight** (CR 3)
**Tribune Lucius**: Use **Noble** with +2 AC (CR 2)
**Centurion Varro**: Use **Veteran** (CR 3)
**Augur Cassia**: Use **Priest** (CR 2)
**Vercingetorix**: Use **Gladiator** (CR 5)
**Thusnelda (Druid)**: Use **Druid** (CR 2)
**Senator Brutus**: Use **Priest** + magic armor (CR 3)

### Corruption Track Reference

**Level 0**: No corruption
**Level 1**: Disturbing dreams
**Level 2**: Disadvantage on Wisdom saves
**Level 3**: DC 12 Wisdom save to retreat
**Level 4**: DC 14 Wisdom save to avoid attacking allies
**Level 5**: Fully corrupted, NPC

### Spear of Mars Properties

**+2 weapon**
**Damage**: 1d8 piercing + 1d8 necrotic
**Attunement Curse**: Disadvantage on Wisdom saves, increasing aggression
**Destruction**: Can only be destroyed at the sacred grove via ritual

---

**Campaign Complete! May Mars smile upon your future games!**
